zh.lifeSummary: 當Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön於1314年出生在德國海因里希_史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 歐登伯格歐登伯格 在 霍爾斯坦時，她的父親Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön40歲，母親Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg27歲。她和Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1348年在她的家鄉享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön于1314年出生在德国海因里希_史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 歐登伯格歐登伯格 在 霍爾斯坦时，她的父亲Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön40岁，母亲Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg27岁。她和Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1348年在她的家乡享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ingeborg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from the name of the fertility god Ing + borg ‘fortification’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön was born in 1314, in Oldenburg in Holstein, Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Prussia, Germany, her father, Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön, was 40 and her mother, Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg, was 27. She had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg. She died in 1348, in her hometown, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön est née en 1314, à Oldenburg in Holstein, Kreis Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg. Elle est décédée en 1348, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans.

Sie hatte mit Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1348 im Alter von 34 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön è nata il nel 1314 nel Oldenburg in Holstein, Kreis Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Germania, sua padre, Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg. Morì nel 1348, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ingeborg of Holstein-Plönが1314年にドイツプレウssンスチレスウィグ-hオルステインクレイス オルデンブルグオルデンブルグ イン ホールステインで生まれた時，父Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plönは40歳，母Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburgは27歳であった。彼女はCount of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburgとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1348年に故郷で34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön(이)가 1314년 독일 프레우ss 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 덴버그 덴버그 인 홀스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1348년 그녀의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön nasceu em 1314, em Oldenburg in Holstein, Kreis Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg. Ela faleceu em 1348, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön родилась в 1314 г. в местности олденбург ин холстин, крис олденбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg. Она умерла в 1348 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön nació en 1314, en Oldenburg in Holstein, Kreis Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Gerhard IV Schleswig-Holstein-Plön, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Anastasia von Schwerin-Wittenburg, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg. Murió en 1348, en su pueblo, a la edad de 34 años.
